title: TcFileServiceTopic export notification
description: JSON body published to SNS (Message field). Use message attributes for subscription filter policies.

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version of this payload shape (e.g. 1.0.0).

traceId.description: Optional correlation id for logs and tracing (pass through to /logRevisionAsync if supported).

createdBy.description: User map as stored on the job (tc id, tiduuid, etc.).

input.description: Snapshot of job input map from DynamoDB.

result.description: For DONE: downloadUrl / fs metadata. For FAILED: error object.
